macro.title: Stock Market Today: Oil Jumps Back Above $100, Dow Slips on Hormuz Blockade — Live Updates - WSJ
Delta unveils new suite design, posh plane; plans upgrade for old, dated cabins - The Points Guy
macro.summary: Delta Air Lines has announced that a next-generation Delta One product is coming to its newest plane next year. Retrofits are also in the works for its older aircraft cabins.

macro.title: Microsoft Plots New Copilot Features Inspired by OpenClaw - The Information
macro.summary: As Microsoft faces growing competition for business customers from Anthropic, it is developing new features that would make its AI assistant Copilot function more like OpenClaw, the open-source AI agent that has taken the AI industry by storm in recent months…

macro.title: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors - BBC
macro.summary: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
